challenges.title: Slide-in Navigation
challenges.description: Create a nav menu that slides in from the left using translate.
challenges.hint: Use translate with negative X value, then transition to 0.
challenges.expected_outcome: Menu slides in from the left.

challenges.title: Bouncing Ball
challenges.description: Create a ball that bounces up and down using translate Y.
challenges.hint: Alternate translateY between 0 and a negative value with transition.

challenges.title: Modal Center Animation
challenges.description: Create a modal that animates from center with scale and translate.
challenges.hint: Start with translate (-50%, -50%) for centering, animate opacity and translate.
challenges.expected_outcome: Modal fades and scales in from center.

solution.css: .modal { position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 50%; translate: -50% -50%; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s, translate 0.3s; } .modal.open { opacity: 1; translate: -50% -50%; }

challenges.title: Staggered List Items
challenges.description: Create a list where items slide in from the right with staggered translate delays.
challenges.hint: Use nth-child for staggered transition delays with translateX.

solution.css: .item { translate: 50px 0; opacity: 0; transition: translate 0.3s, opacity 0.3s; } .item:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.1s; } .item:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.2s; } .item.visible { translate: 0 0; opacity: 1; }

challenges.title: 3D Parallax Card Stack
challenges.description: Create stacked cards that move at different Z depths with translate Z, creating a parallax effect.
challenges.hint: Use translate with Z values and perspective on the parent container.
challenges.expected_outcome: Cards appear at different depths with parallax movement.
